description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous builds that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and uploading native packages for various Ubuntu and Debian versions and architectures, including x86_64, i386, arm64, and armhf. Each job should check out the repository, build in a Docker container, and upload the resulting artifacts. A final job should download the artifacts, create a release, and upload the artifacts to a WebDAV server.
